rationale: Bug hunt C14 (faction boost in merlin_card_system.gd): 0 bugs found. _get_card_factions/_get_faction_boost static helpers correct, weighted selection handles boundaries via fallback, null safety OK for empty faction_rep/options. Feature: run_history was defined in profile but never populated — record_run_end() in hub_controller was never called, and StoreRun.apply_run_rewards() didn't record history. Fixed by adding run_history recording directly in apply_run_rewards (both code paths now covered). Also fixed GFC bug where oghams_used was computed for Anam but not returned in rewards dict. Creator request q-20260415-002 fulfilled (life_at_end, dominant_faction, minigames_won, oghams_used all recorded).
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C15 (store_run.gd run_history + game_flow_controller.gd rewards). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011) or biome walk event pools.
